content.text:
### Recent X Posts on Mistral AI, Mistral Models/API, and ElevenLabs (lang:en)

Your query targets English-language discussions on Mistral AI (French AI lab), its models and API, and ElevenLabs (voice AI, often "11 Labs AI"). Here's a curated summary of the **most relevant recent posts** (from Feb 1-4, 2026), grouped by topic. Activity is high, especially around **ElevenLabs' massive funding announcement** today.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2019048384011854087)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2019058569337868301)

#### ElevenLabs (Dominating Buzz – $500M Raise at $11B Valuation)
- ElevenLabs announced a $500M Series D at **$11B valuation** (led by Sequoia, a16z, etc.), positioning as key infrastructure for AI voice agents in 32+ languages (text-to-speech, cloning, dubbing). They're giving away **1K-11K free credits** via comments ("11B") on their post – over 15K replies in hours.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2019048384011854087)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2019058569337868301)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2019198795050102822)[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2019196061341168002)
- Users praise it for enterprise use (Meta, Epic Games, Revolut), AI agents, and quality; some note switching off improved automation rates.[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2019101909148467434)[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2019109855030857807)[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2019092458664231312)
- Careers push for agent-focused roles; seen as synonymous with AI voice.[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2019058042290201064)[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2018764620891299953)[[10]](https://x.com/i/status/2019178427472040043)

#### Mistral AI & Models (Model Releases, Competition, Access)
- **Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3** (7B params, Apache 2.0, safetensors): Fine-tuned for instructions/tasks; popular on Hugging Face for conversation.[[11]](https://x.com/i/status/2019091086694899866)[[12]](https://x.com/i/status/2019091110841446547)
- **Mistral-Nemo-Instruct-2407** fine-tune (12B params): Strong conversational AI.[[13]](https://x.com/i/status/2018449382786695445)
- French startup Mistral unveils new models rivaling OpenAI/Google (open-weight multimodal, robotics/drones); **Voxtral** for ultra-fast translation ("Too many GPUs makes you lazy").[[14]](https://x.com/i/status/2018614712020221983)[[15]](https://x.com/i/status/2019194260872942046)
- Easy access via **chat.mistral.ai**; EU focus, open-source, speed/small models; some debate vs. retrained Chinese models like DeepSeek.[[16]](https://x.com/i/status/2017544892948303896)[[17]](https://x.com/i/status/2019127407823974860)[[18]](https://x.com/i/status/2018945728358305940)
- Continuity across platforms (e.g., migrating from ChatGPT to Mistral).[[19]](https://x.com/i/status/2018074039055532418)

No direct "Mistral API" mentions in top results, but implied in model access/discussions (e.g., chat.mistral.ai). ElevenLabs dominates due to fresh news; Mistral chatter focuses on open models. For deeper dives (e.g., threads/videos), let me know! [[20]](https://x.com/i/status/2019051385971495395)
